REIS IA BRAND STRATEGY DESIGN SYSTEM v1.0
Strategic Foundation

Brand Strategy

Reis IA is a high-ticket AI consultancy positioned as the strategic partner for businesses that need AI implemented with precision, not experimentation. This page defines the strategic foundation behind every brand decision.

[01] Positioning

Not a tool. Not a SaaS. A strategic AI implementation partner.

Reis IA positions itself as a premium AI consultancy that doesn't sell software — it sells outcomes. The ecosystem helps businesses implement and monetize AI through direct consulting, scalable systems, strategic partnerships, and community building.

We Are
  • Strategic AI implementation
  • High-ticket consultancy
  • Outcome-focused partner
  • Systematic methodology
We Are Not
  • A SaaS product
  • A low-ticket course
  • A tool marketplace
  • An AI agency for hire
[02] Target Audience (ICP)

The Ideal Client Profile for Reis IA is a business decision-maker who understands AI's potential but lacks the methodology to implement it profitably.

Demographics
  • Business owners, CEOs, C-suite executives
  • Revenue: R$1M+ annually (or equivalent)
  • Team size: 10-500 employees
  • Industries: professional services, e-commerce, SaaS, agencies
Psychographics
  • Believes AI is strategic, not just operational
  • Values proven methodology over experimentation
  • Willing to invest in premium solutions
  • Time-constrained — needs results, not tutorials
  • Frustrated with generic AI advice and hype
Pain Points
  • "I know AI can help my business, but I don't know where to start."
  • "I've tried AI tools but can't get consistent results."
  • "I need someone who can implement, not just advise."
  • "Every AI consultant talks about potential, nobody shows proven ROI."
[03] Brand Promise
"AI implementation with precision. Measurable results. No experimentation."

This is the core promise. Every touchpoint — from website copy to client deliverables — must reinforce this commitment to systematic, results-driven AI implementation.

Precision
Every system is engineered, not guessed
Results
Measurable ROI, not theoretical potential
Speed
Implementation in weeks, not months
[04] Competitive Landscape

The AI consultancy market is crowded with generalists and tool resellers. Reis IA differentiates through methodological depth and premium positioning.

Category
Competitors
Reis IA
Pricing
Low-to-mid ticket, subscription
High-ticket, outcome-based
Delivery
Courses, templates, tools
Direct implementation + systems
Promise
"Learn AI" / "AI for everyone"
"AI implementation with precision"
Visual
Generic tech/SaaS aesthetic
Premium architectural dark design
Conversion
Multiple CTAs, free trials
Single path: /agendar or /aplicar
[05] Ecosystem Pillars
01

Builder

Direct AI implementation for businesses. Hands-on consulting that delivers working systems, not advice decks.

02

Systems

Scalable AI systems and automation. Frameworks and methodologies that multiply output without multiplying headcount.

03

Partners

Strategic AI partnerships. Working with selected businesses on long-term AI transformation programs.

04

Network

Community and knowledge sharing. A curated network of business leaders implementing AI at scale.

[06] Conversion Architecture

Every page in the Reis IA ecosystem leads to one of two actions. There are no pricing tables, free trials, or multi-step funnels.

/agendar

Book a strategic call. For prospects who want to explore AI implementation.

/aplicar

Apply to work together. For qualified prospects ready to commit.

CTA Design Rule

Blue accent color is reserved for conversion elements. Maximum 2 blue elements per viewport. If it is blue, it must be actionable. Blue = "act here."

REIS IA
